final:
// // This comment suggests the counter decrements on the rising edge of the clock when the Up signal is high
module UpDownCounter (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset_n,
    input wire up,
    input wire down,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
        if (!reset_n) begin
            count <= 4'b0000; // Reset to 0
        end else if (up && !down) begin
            count <= count + 1; // Increment
        end else if (down && !up) begin
            count <= count - 1; // Decrement
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the counter decrements on the rising edge of the clock when the Up signal is high
